cards.name: The Spirit of the Horde
cards.active: "Strengthened by Numbers" — At end of Setup, count friendly+enemy units. Add friendly count to Atk, then add half enemy count (round down). Excess damage from attacking may be distributed as Direct damage to enemies in same Pairing.
cards.passive: "I Need a Worthy Army" — May only be played if you control 8+ Units.
